description_long: This office building features a modern, angular design with a prominent curved facade clad in light beige stone or concrete panels. The front of the building is dominated by large, horizontal bands of windows separated by thin mullions, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side and rear elevations are more utilitarian, with smaller, regularly spaced windows and minimal ornamentation. The roof is flat and includes a parapet with a simple railing, suggesting possible rooftop access or utility installations. Subtle weathering and streaks are visible on the rear facade, adding realism to the structure. The overall appearance is functional and contemporary, suitable for a commercial or business district.
description: A modern office building with a curved stone facade, large horizontal windows at the front, and a flat roof with a parapet. The design is functional and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Curved front facade with large horizontal windows and beige stone cladding, showing the building's main architectural feature.
description_view_1: Rear view with a flat elevation, smaller windows, and visible weathering streaks, highlighting the utilitarian side of the building.
description_view_2: Top-down angle showing the flat roof, parapet, and minimal detailing on the side wall.
description_view_3: Side view with a series of small, regularly spaced windows and the continuation of the curved facade.
attribute_window_pattern: Horizontal bands of large, rectangular windows on the front facade; smaller, evenly spaced rectangular windows on the side and rear elevations.
